name: starting-with-christ
description: Starting with Christ — Bible study app with reading plan, reflection, and a small community.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html sw.js privacy.html terms.html dist/
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run ios:sync && npx cap open ios

author: Averyscove
